cells.rationale: Subtle concurrency correctness invariant: a TOCTOU liveness/identity CAS fence over a live claim where a false-dead release double-dispatches, plus re-fold determinism and a contract-touching RPC reply path — a nameable intelligence-bound reason.

Well-specified single-surface producer reroute that template-follows an existing dead-letter status shape (deterministic dl_id, ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING, prune arm) with a named acceptance and no design judgment, so GPT-first at the default execution band.

Contract-shaped design call — settling a new RPC surface vs extending replay_dead_letter and updating the guardrail — layered on re-fold determinism preserving original ts and two divergent gate predicates, a cross-cutting architectural cascade warranting opus.

Security invariant task: narrowing a fail-closed commit-rail gate by trusted producer-derived evidence where a scoping bug flips it fail-open and attacker-influenced fields must not widen blast radius — a hard opus gate.
